title: kyllinga alba subsp. ascolepidioides
intro: Kyllinga alba subsp. ascolepidioides, also known as the White Flat Sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Kyllinga alba subsp. ascolepidioides is typically used in teas, infusions, and poultices, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
